coach_notes: Focus on mastering graphic design tools like Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator) and Figma, as these are essential for most design roles. Start with free online tutorials on platforms like YouTube or Coursera, then practice by recreating designs you admire. Building a portfolio with even small projects will boost your confidence and show employers your growing skills.

jobs.title: Shift Leader
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Your cash handling, communication, ability to work under pressure, and Word/Excel skills are directly relevant. High school education and English fluency support the role.
jobs.gaps: No explicit leadership or supervisory experience mentioned. May need to demonstrate team coordination and conflict resolution.

jobs.title: Painter
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Your painting skill is directly applicable. Creativity, attention to detail, and ability to work under pressure are strong assets. Communication skills help with client interaction.
jobs.gaps: No mention of specific painting techniques (e.g., spray, brush, decorative) or experience with large-scale projects. May need to demonstrate portfolio or safety knowledge.

jobs.title: Interior Design Coordinator
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Your skills in design, creativity, visual communication, and communication align well with interior design coordination. Education and high school background provide a foundation.
jobs.gaps: No specific interior design software or project management experience mentioned. Lack of experience with client coordination and material sourcing.

jobs.title: Summer Theatre Production Assistant (Summer 2026 002920)
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Your communication skills, creativity, and ability to work under pressure are valuable for theatre production. English fluency and teamwork are assets.
jobs.gaps: No direct theatre or production experience. Missing skills in stage management, lighting, sound, or costume handling. Summer 2026 timing may require planning.

jobs.title: Assistant Designer – Girls (7-16, 4-6x) Apparel
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Your design, creativity, visual communication, and painting skills are relevant to apparel design. Education and communication skills support collaboration.
jobs.gaps: No specific fashion design experience or knowledge of garment construction, textiles, or trend analysis. Missing portfolio or industry-specific software skills.
